CSF Immunoglobulin G (IgG) Index 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/csf-immunoglobulin-g-igg-index/ 
CSF Immunoglobulin G (IgG) Index 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a CSF IgG index? 
CSF stands for cerebrospinal fluid. IgG stands for immunoglobulin G. It is a type of antibody. Antibodies are proteins that your immune system makes to fight germs . A CSF IgG index measures the levels of IgG in your cerebrospinal fluid.
CSF is a clear, colorless fluid that flows in and around your
